The only AI video tool with built-in ideation, publishing, and scheduling.

Save 70% of Your Content Creation Time

Social media-ready videos with no experience needed! Find viral topics and Syllaby creates a video with script, visuals, subtitles, and your own AI voice!

Start 7-day free trial

You can cancel your subscription anytime

Character Consistency That Feels Natural

Maintain the same look, feel, and personality from scene to scene.

Perfect for Any Format

Create scroll-stopping vertical videos for TikTok/IG Reels or cinematic horizontal videos for YouTube and ads.

Create videos to promote your business

Your ideas + our models = polished, high-impact videos.

250,000+ videos created in Syllaby

Sora 2 & Sora 2 Pro

Ultra-realistic motion, shadows & cinematic depth.

Google VEO 3

Sharp character consistency & vibrant colors

Seedance

Fast, expressive, creator-friendly movement.

Cinematic Vertical Output

Optimized for Reels, TikTok & Shorts with model-enhanced clarity.

Highest Visual Quality

We integrate every major breakthrough model the moment it launches.

Syllaby Features

Character consistency

When creating faceless videos with AI-generated visuals, consistency is key to keeping your audience engaged. Syllaby ensures your video character maintains the same look, feel, and presence across every scene—so your videos feel smooth, professional, and instantly recognizable from start to finish.

Start 7-day free trial

Improves SEO

Focus on Real Questions

Increases Audience Reach

Be the Trend Setter

Keyword Research: Find Questions Your Customers Ask Online!

Syllaby isn’t just a tool. It’s a philosophy and a repeatable process! Social media platforms are search engines. By creating videos based on the real questions people are asking online in your industry, you’ll be able to create evergreen content that resonates with your target audience. This means you’ll be able to generate more leads consistently!
Start 7-day free trial

Don’t Like Being On Camera? Get A Real Clone!

Whether you prefer to clone your own avatar or select from our pre-given options, Syllaby will generate scripts and visuals effortlessly, allowing you to create personalized videos in just a few clicks, infusing charm and personality into your content.
Try it now

Turn Text Into Stunning Videos Instantly

With our new Text-to-Video feature, you can generate high-quality videos from a simple prompt. Just describe your idea, choose your preferred style and duration, and let our AI handle the rest from visuals to motion no camera or editing skills required.

Start 7-day free trial

Frequently Asked Questions

What is Syllaby?

Syllaby is an AI-powered tool that streamlines the process of creating viral social media videos for businesses by assisting with ideation, content scheduling, outline and script generation, and even avatar-based video creation. It offers a systematic workflow tailored to various industries, along with features like an organizational content calendar and in-tool tutorials, making video marketing more accessible and efficient.

Who can use Syllaby?

Syllaby can be used by businesses, marketers, sales agents, content creators, and professionals in various industries looking to create and run successful video marketing campaigns on social media. Its functionality is designed to support video content creation across a wide array of topics, making it versatile for different users.

Is my data secure?

Absolutely! We adhere to strict privacy policies and use encryption to ensure your data is secure.

What languages does your tool support?

We offer content creation in multiple languages, including English, French, German, Italian, Spanish, Czech, Danish, Dutch, Finnish, Indonesian, Polish, Portuguese, Swedish, Turkish, Vietnamese, Hungarian, Filipino, Greek, Russian, Japanese, Korean, Hindi, Chinese, Arabic, Persian

Is there a free trial?

Yes, we offer a free trial period for you to explore our tool and see if it’s the right fit for you. You can cancel anytime during the trial period without any obligation.

What is your Refund Policy?
Our Refund Policy is designed to address any unsatisfactory experiences on our platform. While paid subscription fees are non-refundable except when required by law, we will gladly refund any unused credits remaining in your account within the first 30 days of your subscription. Upon receiving your request, we will process the refund in accordance with our policy, typically within 14 days. Your satisfaction is our priority, and we aim to ensure a fair and accommodating refund process.
What kind of Support do you offer?
We have a dedicated support team available via email, and one-on-one user interview/ tutorial to assist you with any questions or issues.
Is training provided for new users?
We offer a comprehensive knowledge base, video tutorials, and customer support to guide you through every step of the process. Also, on every page of the tool, there’s a watch tutorial video button that provides individual guidance specific to that page to help you get the best results.
What integrations does Syllaby offer?
Syllaby offers integrations with various popular platforms to enhance user experience and functionality. Our current integrations include YouTube, Tiktok, Meta and Google.
Do my credits rollover every month

No, credits do not rollover. So please make sure you use them all by the end of each billing cycle.

How Are Credits Charged?

Credits are charged as follows:

Idea Discovery: 15 credits per idea generated.

Faceless Video: 13 credits per 1-minute video.

Note: Charges are based on whole minutes. For example, a video that is 5 minutes and 13 seconds will be charged as 6 minutes (6 x 13 = 78 credits). While we strive for accuracy, there may be slight discrepancies in calculations.

Image Regeneration: The first 3 regenerations are free; each additional regeneration costs 1 credit.

Thumbnail Generation: 1 credit for every 3 thumbnails generated.

Script Generation: Each one-minute AI script costs 1 credit.

Exporting a Faceless Video: There is no charge for exporting after editing.

Text To Scene (Sora 2): 3 credits per second.

Text To Scene (Sora 2 Pro): 13 credits per second.

Text To Scene (Google VEO3 Fast): 4 credits per second.

Text To Scene (Google VEO3 Quality): 11 credits per second.

Text To Scene (Seedance Lite): ⁓1 credit per second.

Text To Scene (Seedance Pro): ⁓2 credits per second.

Frequently Asked Questions
How can I create engaging video content?
Creating engaging video content involves understanding your audience, crafting compelling narratives, and utilizing eye-catching visuals. Leverage Syllaby's tools for script generation and AI avatars to enhance creativity and streamline production for maximum impact.
What features does Syllaby offer for video creation?
Syllaby offers a range of features for video creation, including AI-driven script generation, customizable avatars, easy editing tools, and seamless publishing options for social media, enabling users to produce engaging content quickly and efficiently.
How can I use AI to generate scripts for my videos?
Using AI to generate scripts for your videos is straightforward. Simply input your topic or key ideas into an AI-powered tool, like Syllaby, which will then produce engaging scripts tailored to your content needs, saving you time and enhancing creativity.
